note: Regenerate via MATLAB: addpath('tools/matlab'); freeze_reference_values(). Bump source_commit when an upstream formula changes.

origin_export.note: freeze via tools/matlab/freeze_export_extra.m; .ogs Date line exempted

consolidated_csv_standard.note: two synthetic same-measurement neutron scans; freeze via freeze_export_extra.m

consolidated_csv_origin.note: two synthetic same-measurement neutron scans; freeze via freeze_export_extra.m

xrdml_attenuation.note: synthetic 1D scan; per-pixel factors 6x1.0 then 4x100.0 exercise the attenuation multiply (n_scans_att_corrected=1)

xrdml_rsm_map.matlab_fn: parser.importXRDML .metadata.parserSpecific.map2D (N omega x M 2theta intensity matrix + axes)
xrdml_rsm_map.note: freeze writes the NxM map2D matrix (jsonencode keeps it 2-D nested rows); the Python test reshapes the Intensity column by map_shape and compares axes + matrix

ppms_synth_default.note: synthetic fixture (no real PPMS corpus); golden frozen from MATLAB on it

lakeshore_synth_default.note: synthetic fixture (no real Lake Shore corpus); golden frozen from MATLAB on it

excel_synth_default.note: synthetic .xlsx (no generic Excel corpus); golden frozen from MATLAB on it

sims_shared_default.note: synthetic shared-depth fixture; exact parity (no union-grid interp)

sims_barrier_default.note: real paired-column SIMS; exercises union-grid interpolation

xrdcsv_standard_both.matlab_fn: utilities.writeXRDcsv (Format=standard, Intensity=both, IncludeMetadata=false) on parser.importXRDML output
xrdcsv_standard_both.note: writer golden; frozen text lines, byte-exact comparison (IncludeMetadata=false -> deterministic)

calc_globalfit.matlab_fn: fitting.globalFit (3 exp-decay datasets, A free / tau,C shared)
calc_globalfit.note: joint shared-parameter NLLS via curve_fit; params/errors ~1e-9; Inf bounds → null → restore to ±inf; freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_multipeakfit.matlab_fn: bosonPlotter.peakAnalysis.onFitSimultaneous (composite peaks+poly-bg fit; 5 cases: Lorentzian, Gaussian, PV+Shared-FWHM, Lorentzian+constrain×3, PV+Shared-FWHM+eta) + exposed bosonPlotter.buildLinkedPacker
calc_multipeakfit.note: fminsearch is eval-limited at default MaxFunEvals=200*nFree (MaxIter=30000 set, MaxFunEvals not) — Python replicates that budget so scipy Nelder-Mead matches bit-for-bit (worst rel ~7e-9); linked packer is exact. SPVII→symmetric Pearson(m=1.5), TCH→eta=0.5 PV in the composite (per-peak fit uses full forms). Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (mpfFreeze).

calc_globalcurvefit.matlab_fn: fitting.globalCurveFit (named per-group shared params; 4 cases: Gaussian shared-sigma / no-constraint / subset-share + Exp shared-tau, with the ASCII→Greek alias path)
calc_globalcurvefit.note: fminsearch over the curveFit logit/log bound transform (MaxFunEvals=4*MaxIter, not eval-limited) + numerical-Hessian errors scaled by global chiSqRed; converges fully so scipy Nelder-Mead matches MATLAB (params ~3e-9, errors ~2e-8). Constraint dataset indices are 1-based in the golden → −1 to 0-based for Python. Inf bounds passed explicitly (not via serialized null). Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (gcfFreeze).

calc_surfacefit.matlab_fn: fitting.{surfaceModels (7 model evals), surfaceAutoGuess (per-model p0), surfaceFit (4 full fits: Plane/Paraboloid/2D-Gaussian/2D-Lorentzian, internal auto-guess + fminsearch)}
calc_surfacefit.note: model evals exact (~1e-16); auto-guess exact (~1e-15, numpy lstsq vs MATLAB backslash for linear models, centroid for peaks); full fits use the curveFit bound transform + fminsearch (MaxFunEvals=2*MaxIter, converges fully) so scipy matches MATLAB (params ~1e-9, errors ~7e-9). Shared flattened (x,y) grid emitted column-major so Python uses the identical points. Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (sfFreeze).

calc_rsm.matlab_fn: fitting.rsmAnalyze (synthetic 2-Gaussian RSM: smooth → 3x3 local maxima → greedy min-sep → per-peak surfaceFit in angle + Q) + fitting.rsmStrain (chain + 3 standalone closed-form cases)
calc_rsm.note: deterministic synthetic map + Q grids emitted so Python runs on identical data. Peak detection matches exactly (separable conv2 smooth, stable descending sort, greedy suppression); per-peak fits ~1e-9 (centres ~1e-12), background ~1e-6 abs. rsmStrain closed-form exact (NaN/None for symmetric eps_par + undefined relaxation). Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (rsmFreeze).

calc_bgregion.matlab_fn: BosonPlotter onBGMouseUp pure core (box-mask + polyfit + region stats): 4 cases (linear shoulder, y-bounded linear, quadratic, cubic)
calc_bgregion.note: raw-x polyfit (no normalization, matches MATLAB polyfit) over points inside [x_min,x_max]x[y_min,y_max]; coeffs ~1e-12, full-range background ~4e-12 even for the ill-conditioned cubic, sample-std (N-1) exact. Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (bgrFreeze).

calc_bgfromfile.matlab_fn: bosonPlotter.applyCorrections step 4 (BG-from-file): subtract interp1(bgX, bgY, x, method, 0) from every channel; 3 cases (linear / pchip / spline) over an active range that overhangs the bg range on both sides
calc_bgfromfile.note: reference-background dataset subtraction with 0-fill extrapolation outside the bg x-range. linear=np.interp(left=0,right=0); pchip=PchipInterpolator(extrapolate=False)→nan_to_num(0); spline=CubicSpline not-a-knot(extrapolate=False)→nan_to_num(0). 2-channel active covers the per-channel loop; all 3 methods match ~1e-14 abs (tol 1e-9 for cross-platform FP headroom). Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (bgfFreeze).

calc_interp2d_natural.matlab_fn: utilities.interpolate2D (Method=natural; Sibson natural-neighbour on a 12-point scattered set -> 5x5 interior grid)
calc_interp2d_natural.note: Sibson coordinates are geometrically unique, so the hand-rolled port matches MATLAB to ~1e-15 (previously a Clough-Tocher fallback, structural-only). MATLAB aliases 'cubic' to 'natural'. Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m.

calc_errorprop.matlab_fn: utilities.errorProp linear method (4 cases: scalar f=a*b+c, fully-correlated sum, vector-valued f, single-input f=x^2)
calc_errorprop.note: central-difference partials + full-covariance variance; matches MATLAB exactly (0.0 abs diff). The Monte Carlo method is RNG-based -> invariant-tested in test_errors.py, not frozen. Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (errPropFreeze).

calc_qspace.matlab_fn: parser.computeQSpace (coplanar RSM Qx/Qz from an omega×2theta grid): theta=2theta/2; Qx=(4pi/lambda)sin(theta)sin(omega-theta); Qz=...cos(...). axis1=omega (N=5), axis2=2theta (M=7), Cu Kalpha1.
calc_qspace.note: pure trig; matlab meshgrid(axis2',axis1) → N×M [omega][2theta] grids ≡ python broadcast omega(N,1)×2theta(1,M). N≠M catches an axis swap. Matches ~1e-13. Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (qspFreeze).

calc_planespacings.matlab_fn: calc.crystal.planeSpacings (allowed-reflection lists for 4 cells: FCC a=5.4307 Centering=F, BCC a=2.867 Centering=I, tetragonal a=3.905 c=3.95, hexagonal a=4.758 c=12.991 gamma=120; Cu Kalpha1)
calc_planespacings.note: hkl enumeration + centering absence rules (P/F/I/A/B/C/R) + round(d,8) grouping + canonical-rep tie-break (sortrows[nNegs,-sum,|hkl|]) + crystal-system inference. hkl/multiplicity exact; d/2theta ~1e-12 (identical triclinic tensor form as d_spacing). Pawley dependency. Freeze via freeze_calc_values.m (psFreeze).

calc_batchfit.matlab_fn: fitting.batchFit (Exponential Decay across 4 datasets, auto-guess + bounds)
calc_batchfit.note: per-dataset curve_fit summary; params/errors ~1e-9 (Nelder-Mead), stats exact; Inf bounds serialize as null → restore to ±inf; freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_trackpeak.matlab_fn: fitting.trackPeak (Gaussian + Lorentzian, drifting-peak series, follow on)
calc_trackpeak.note: per-dataset single-peak curve_fit (Nelder-Mead↔fminsearch); worst rel ~1e-9 → rtol 1e-6/atol 1e-8; freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_odr.matlab_fn: fitting.odrFit (Deming/orthogonal regression: default λ=1, λ=4, λ-from-errors)
calc_odr.note: closed-form Deming + jackknife SEs; exact match ~1e-14; freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_constraints.matlab_fn: fitting.applyConstraints (free params + constraint expressions → full vector)
calc_constraints.note: exact (deterministic string→value); 5 cases incl. named refs, math fns, and the reindexed double-replacement quirk (faithful to MATLAB); freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_multipeak.note: exact closed-form evaluators (match ~1e-14); freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_peakfit.matlab_fn: bosonPlotter.peak.fitSinglePeak (5 models on synthetic peaks + tiny perturbation, window [29,31], seed center 30)
calc_peakfit.note: Nelder-Mead (scipy) vs fminsearch; worst observed rel ~3e-7 on Split-Pearson-VII bg → rtol 1e-5 / atol 1e-6; freeze via freeze_calc_values.m

calc_hysteresis_models.matlab_fn: fitting.hysteresisModels() — each model .fcn evaluated at .p0 over H = linspace(-5000, 5000, 40)
calc_hysteresis_models.note: 5 M-H loop models (tanh, F+P, linear BG, approach-to-saturation, Langevin+BG); grid avoids H=0 so 1/|H| & 1/H^2 stay finite; freeze via tools/matlab/freeze_calc_values.m

hdf5_synth_default.matlab_fn: utilities.exportHDF5 (CorrData + Corrections + Peaks), read back via h5info/h5read/h5readatt
hdf5_synth_default.note: binary HDF5 bytes differ between MATLAB h5write and h5py; this freezes the LOGICAL content (dataset paths/shapes/classes/values + every attribute name->value). 'toolboxName' (quantized vs quantized_matlab) and 'createdAt' (timestamp) are presence-only, not value-compared. MATLAB jsonencode flattens 2-D datasets column-major -> Python reshapes with order='F'.

xrdml_map2d.note: frozen @ quantized_matlab aee70d1 (snapshot/coupled cloud support) via tools/matlab/freeze_xrdml_map2d.m; intensity in cps (counting time 2 s exercises the division)

calc_reductions.matlab_fn: calc.crystal.williamsonHall (direct) + bosonPlotter.peakTools.{fftThickness,reflectivityFFT} (real dialog functions run headless in -batch; auto-compute-on-open result) + the computeAsymmetryForExport.m lines 62-70 formula (inlined: the function needs the GUI AppState)
calc_reductions.note: frozen @ quantized_matlab aee70d1 via tools/matlab/freeze_calc_values.m redFreeze(); 8 sub-cases: WH basic + instrumental broadening; Laue-fringe FFT (flat envelope, 80 nm); Kiessig neutron single/superlattice/suppressed-order-2 + XRR mode; spin asymmetry with non-positive + NaN points locking the validity mask; fft_magnitude/amplitudes compared at atol 1e-8 (near-cancellation FFT bins differ MATLAB-vs-numpy at ~1e-10 abs on spectra peaking ~4e3)
